title: Enable Suricata IDS at least in detection mode on WAN
close_reason: Enabled Suricata IDS in PCAP mode on WAN with 17 rulesets (abuse.ch, ET Open threat intel, web server, malware, exploit, scan, DoS, coinminer, botcc, Cobalt Strike C2, Spamhaus DROP). EVE HTTP+TLS logging enabled. Syslog forwarding enabled.

title: Configure DNS-over-TLS forwarding instead of ISP DNS
Enable logging on all WAN pass rules and GeoIP block rule
Anti-lockout exposes SSH on BACKUP_MANAGEMENT interface
WireGuard interface allows any-to-any - restrict to needed subnets
VLAN_GUEST has zero traffic - verify functionality
Add explicit IPv6 firewall rules for VLANs
Enable Unbound DNS with DNSSEC on all internal interfaces
Fix core_manage audit issues: destructive ops gate, positional params, input validation, error handling
description: Address all issues found in core_manage audit: 1) Gate destructive methods (systemHalt, systemReboot, backupRevertBackup, backupDeleteBackup) behind confirm flag 2) Fix positional parameter mapping for 21 core methods (service, backup, hasync, snapshot, tunable ops) 3) Add missing params to schema (name, host, backup, etc.) 4) Remove otherArgs leak in callModularTool 5) Improve error handling for non-axios errors
close_reason: All 5 audit issues addressed in generate-tools.ts, build.ts, and regenerated index.js

title: Set Unbound hideidentity and hideversion when enabling DNS
WAN ports 80/443 open from any source with no rate limiting
INTERNAL group floating rule passes all IPv4 any-to-any
